title: dyoshikawa/rulesync — A Utility CLI for AI Coding Agents
excerpt: Node.js CLI tool that generates configuration files for AI development tools from unified rule files... supports 30+ agents (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI...). Unified syntax for rules, ignore files, MCP, commands, subagents, skills. v8.23.0 (May 2026), 242 releases, MIT, ~1.1k stars.
